title: cheilanthes grayi
intro: Cheilanthes grayi is a species of fern known as the Gray's lip fern, a type of lycophyte that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cheilanthes grayi has been found to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including relieving coughs and reducing mucus production. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, often in combination with other medicinal plants, and is typically consumed as a tea or added to topical creams and ointments.
